< Home >

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Page.Requests.PollSettings

Contains configuration settings that control poll behavior and result display. Defines how users interact with the poll and when/how results are shown.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
ShowResults

Controls when poll results are visible to users (e.g. "AfterVoting", "Always", "Never").

 string

None.
DisplayNumberOfVotes

Indicates whether the number of votes for each alternative should be displayed.

 boolean

None.
UserCanChangeVote

Indicates whether users are allowed to change their vote after initially voting.

 boolean

None.
